sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: normal serving sizes are much smaller than 100 grams because that trims how much of the paper score you really realise. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.

closing.summary: Cocoa Powder (Unsweetened) has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
